notes: Approach, presentation, objection handling, and closing are staged selling activities.
principle: Closing-oriented actions should fit the buyer's readiness rather than replace discovery or evaluation.
review_note: Directly supports premature-closing failure conditions in transition rules.
source_locator: OpenStax Principles of Marketing 15.3, personal selling process

copyright_note: compact paraphrase from source locator; no source text stored
notes: Consultative selling emphasizes discovering needs before proposing a solution.
principle: Recommendation before need discovery increases mismatch risk and can reduce customer trust.
review_note: Supports need-discovery-before-recommendation risk; compact and actionable.

copyright_note: compact paraphrase from source locator; no source text stored
notes: Pressure can backfire when the customer perceives a threat to choice freedom.
principle: High-pressure recommendations can trigger reactance when customer autonomy appears threatened.
review_note: Core pressure-reactance principle for high-pressure Recommend failure modeling.
source_locator: A Theory of Psychological Reactance, freedom-threat mechanism

notes: Nonverbal feedback helps judge whether an audience is receptive or disengaging.
principle: Disengagement cues should reduce intrusive information delivery and favor holding or reassurance.
review_note: Connects nonverbal disengagement cues to less intrusive actions.
source_locator: Business Communication for Success 11.5, nonverbal feedback
